name: Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a 12-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Cook onions and bell peppers until tender.
4. Add soup, cheddar cheese, yogurt, crushed red pepper, black pepper, macaroni shells, and tuna until combined.
5. Pour the entire mixture into a 2 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Meanwhile, combine bread crumbs and fat-free Parmesan cheese.
7. Sprinkle the breadcrumb topping over the vegetable mixture.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
